headline: Cathie Wood has brutal response to 50% Bitcoin crash
summary: It has been nearly six months since the flash crypto crash on Oct. 10 last year that wiped out millions of dollars in a single day. Bitcoin (BTC) had hit the all-time high (ATH) of $126,080 only a few days earlier on Oct. 6, but currently, it is trading 47% lower at $66,600.67. However, ...

headline: Robinhood: A New Bull Cycle Is Forming (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Robinhood (HOOD) experienced a 38% year-to-date decline after previously strong 2025 performance.

headline: Robinhood Banking Deposits Grow As Trading Heavy Model Faces New Test
summary: Robinhood Markets' banking arm has reached more than $1.5b in deposits from nearly 100,000 funded customers. Deposits have grown by roughly 50% since the unit launched in November 2025. The banking products sit alongside Robinhood's brokerage and crypto offerings as part of a push toward a broad financial app. Robinhood Banking offers integrated FDIC insured checking and high yield savings accounts within the existing platform. For investors watching NasdaqGS:HOOD, the move into banking...
